perks.name: Great Weapon Mastery
perks.description: Your improved fighting techniques increase your damage dealt with two-handed weapons. [20% more damage]

perks.name: Great Weapon Mastery
perks.description: Your improved fighting techniques increase your damage dealt with two-handed weapons even more. [40% more damage]

perks.name: Barbaric Might
perks.description: Your power attacks become mighty blows that will penetrate armor and are less tiring. [-30% power attack stamina cost, +30% armor penetration]

perks.name: Devastating Strike
perks.description: Your two-handed combat style has improved so much that all power attacks have become devastating. [20% more power attack damage, +10% critical hit chance]

perks.name: Hyper Armor
perks.description: Your power attacks are almost unstoppable. [Take 75% less poise damage while power attacking with two-handed weapons.]

perks.name: Mighty Strike
perks.description: You can fell almost any foe with a single strike of your two-hander. [50% more poise damage]

perks.name: Warbringer
perks.description: Your barbaric instincts strengthen as you or your foe meet their end. [Your two-handed power attacks deal up to 100% more damage based on the difference between your health and your target's health]

perks.name: Devastating Charge
perks.description: You've learned to perform a leaping power attack while sprinting, reducing your enemies to smithereens. [Able to do sprinting power attack which has a 50% chance to critical hit]

perks.name: Hafted Blade Focus
perks.description: You've become familiar with battle axes and halberds. [Attacks deal 20-60 extra damage over 20 seconds scaling with weapon skill, +10% armor penetration]

perks.name: Hafted Blade Focus
perks.description: become an advanced battle axe and halberd fighter. [Attacks deal 40-120 extra damage over 20 seconds scaling with weapon skill, +20% armor penetration]

perks.name: Hafted Blade Focus
perks.description: You've become a master of battle axe and halberd combat. [Attacks deal 60-180 extra damage over 20 seconds scaling with weapon skill, +30% armor penetration]

perks.name: Longweapon Focus
perks.description: You've acquired the advanced techniques of using greatswords and pikes. [Attacks reduce target's melee damage by 11% for 10 seconds, +11% critical hit chance]

perks.name: Longweapon Focus
perks.description: You've acquired the advanced techniques of using greatswords and pikes. [Attacks reduce target's melee damage by 22% for 10 seconds, +22% critical hit chance]

perks.name: Longweapon Focus
perks.description: You've become a master of using greatswords and pikes. [Attacks reduce target's melee damage by 33% for 10 seconds, +33% critical hit chance]

perks.name: Warhammer Focus
perks.description: You've learned some techniques to crush armor with warhammers. [3% more attack damage, +13% armor penetration]

perks.name: Warhammer Focus
perks.description: You've become an advanced warhammer fighter and know how to find weak spots in enemy armor. [6% more attack damage, +30% armor penetration]

perks.name: Warhammer Focus
perks.description: You've become a masterly warhammer fighter, rendering armor almost useless. [10% more attack damage, +40% armor penetration]

perks.name: Quarterstaff & Battlestaff Focus
perks.description: You've learned the basics of quarterstaff combat. [Power attacks cost 20% less stamina, +10% damage when not power attacking]

perks.name: Quarterstaff & Battlestaff Focus
perks.description: You've acquired the advanced techniques of quarterstaff combat. [Power attacks cost 40% less stamina, +20% damage when not power attacking

perks.name: Quarterstaff & Battlestaff Focus
perks.description: You've become a master of quarterstaff combat. [Power attacks cost 60% less stamina, +30% damage when not power attacking]

perks.name: Reversal
perks.description: With enough momentum, you can slash deeper into targets with power attacks. [+10% critical hit chance and 2x critical hit damage when power attacking]

perks.name: Onslaught
perks.description: You can deliver maximum force with your warhammer to knock off targets that fail to resist. [power attacks with warhammers knock off targets by 10% chance, 25% more damage against staggered targets.]

perks.name: Shield Breaker
perks.description: Mighty swing with a battleaxe can cleave through target's defense, hindering them from blocking next attacks. [power attacks with battleaxes reduce target's blockable damage by 90% for 10 seconds]

perks.name: Battle Hide
perks.description: You take half damage from enemy attacks while power attacking or blocking with quarterstaves and battlestaves.

perks.name: Execute
perks.description: Standing power attacks with battleaxes and halberds execute targets below 25% Health, delivering a critical strike that deals twenty times critical damage.

perks.name: Defensive Strike
perks.description: You can more efficiently block and counterattack with quarterstaves. [Quarterstaves block and bash twice as much and do 25% more critical damage]

perks.name: Critical Slam
perks.description: Whenever a standing power attack with a warhammer inflicts a critical strike, it deals 3% more critical damage per point of Stamina.

perks.name: Death or Glory
perks.description: Two-handed attacks with greatswords and pikes deal up to 200% more damage below 90% Health. The damage bonus increases as your Health decreases.
